name: Spell Vanishing
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>呪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>術</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>抹</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>まっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>消</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Discard 2 cards from your hand. Negate the activation of a Spell Card and destroy it. Also, look at your opponent's hand and Deck and if you find any Spell Cards of the same name as the destroyed Spell Card, send all of them to the Graveyard.
eff: Discard 2 cards from your hand. Negate the activation of a Spell Card and destroy it. Also, look at your opponent's hand and Deck and if you find any Spell Cards of the same name as the destroyed Spell Card, send all of them to the Graveyard.

action: Sends from your opponent's hand to your opponent's Graveyard
Sends from your opponent's Deck to your opponent's Graveyard
mst: Negates the activation of Spell Cards
